offensive.name: Chain Spark
offensive.description: Your lightning leaps from one victim to the next.
tiers: When the effect deals lightning damage, choose 1 additional creature within 10 feet of the original target — it takes half damage.
Chain to 2 additional targets within 15 feet. Creatures that fail their Dexterity save take full damage.
Chain to 4 creatures within 20 feet. Each failed save creates a secondary arc that deals 1d10 extra lightning damage to one creature adjacent to the failed target.
Trigger a Chainstorm — lightning arcs to all creatures within 30 feet of the original target. Each must make a Dexterity save or take full damage and be Stunned until the end of their next turn.

offensive.name: Thunderbreak
offensive.description: Your lightning doesn't just shock — it shatters.
tiers: Targets hit by this effect must succeed on a Strength save or be knocked back 10 feet.
The knockback increases to 20 feet, and failed saves also impose disadvantage on Concentration checks until the end of their next turn.
Targets take +1d10 thunder damage, and nearby objects or barriers within 5 feet must make a Dexterity save or shatter.
Thunderbreak becomes a concussive burst — all creatures within 20 feet of the original target must succeed on a Strength save or be knocked prone, pushed 30 feet, and Deafened for 1 minute.

offensive.name: Flash Precision
offensive.description: Lightning always hits first. It doesn't miss — it decides.
tiers: You may reroll one attack roll or saving throw associated with this effect, taking the new result.
Your lightning effects ignore cover and cannot have disadvantage imposed on their attack rolls.
Once per effect, you may automatically hit with one lightning-based attack or spell — no roll required.

Designate one creature within 120 feet — it is struck by a Sky Bolt with no attack roll or saving throw. It takes 12d12 lightning damage, cannot use reactions until the end of its next turn, and immediately drops Concentration if applicable.

supportive.name: Voltstride
supportive.description: You move as fast as thought.
tiers: When casting the effect, you may teleport up to 10 feet as part of the same action.
The teleport range increases to 30 feet, and you gain advantage on the next Dexterity saving throw you make before the start of your next turn.
You may teleport before or after the effect resolves, and you ignore opportunity attacks during this movement.
For 1 minute, you may divide yourself into afterimages — gaining +5 AC against one attack per turn, and teleporting up to 60 feet as a reaction whenever you are targeted by an attack or spell.

control.name: Conductive Charge
control.description: You leave behind a charge that's waiting to explode.
tiers: If a creature takes lightning damage, it becomes Charged. The next time it takes damage before the end of your next turn, it takes +1d6 lightning damage.
Charged creatures glow faintly, cannot benefit from invisibility, and have disadvantage on Dexterity saving throws.
The charge jumps — if the Charged creature is within 10 feet of another creature when it takes damage, the second creature also takes the bonus lightning damage.
Charged targets become highly unstable — if they die while Charged, they explode, dealing 4d10 lightning damage in a 20-foot radius (Dexterity save halves).

complementEffects.name: Overclock
complementEffects.description: The voltage doesn't just hurt — it scrambles.
complementEffects.effect: On a hit or failed saving throw against the primary effect, the target's nervous system is briefly overloaded — they must succeed on a Dexterity saving throw against your Verum DC or act last in the initiative order on their next turn, regardless of their initiative roll.
upgrades: Level 5+: On a failed save, the target also cannot take reactions until the start of their next turn.
Level 11+: Creatures that fail also have disadvantage on the first attack roll or saving throw they make on their next turn.

complementEffects.name: Static Field
complementEffects.description: Your charge bleeds outward, sharpening everything around you.
complementEffects.effect: When the primary effect resolves, you generate a Static Field for 1 minute — allies within 15 feet of you gain a +2 bonus to initiative rolls and cannot be surprised while within range.
upgrades: Level 5+: Allies within the field also gain advantage on Dexterity saving throws while the field is active.
Level 11+: The radius increases to 30 feet, and allies within it may use their reaction to move up to 10 feet when they would otherwise be hit by an attack.

complementEffects.name: Groundstrike
complementEffects.description: The bolt pins them to the earth.
complementEffects.effect: When the primary effect hits or a target fails their saving throw, that target must succeed on a Dexterity saving throw against your Verum DC or be unable to teleport, use movement-based abilities, or take the Dash action until the end of their next turn.
upgrades: Level 5+: On a failed save, the target also cannot take reactions and has their movement speed reduced by 15 feet.
Level 11+: Creatures that fail are additionally knocked prone, and standing up costs them their full movement rather than half.
